title: Mine Game: Order of the Craft
description: An alternative version of Minecraft. Adding all removed, version exclusive, and mentioned features to the game to make a unique, and yet somehow nostalgic, experience.
body:
A unique experience adding all removed, version exclusive, and mentioned features to Minecraft while retaining all modern features. 

watch this for the intended gameplay experience, [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vUBEoNy4T28](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vUBEoNy4T28)
